title: cyperus unispicatus
intro: Cyperus unispicatus, also known as the single-spike cyperus, is a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus unispicatus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and swelling, and treat various infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for internal use, as well as applied topically to the affected area in the form of poultices or compresses.
